## Findings
- [ ] **[Coverage/REGRESSION] Coverage dropped 4% vs v0.6.2**
  - **Status quo:** Overall coverage regressed from 78% (v0.6.2) to 74% (HEAD). Delta: -4%.
  - **Likely cause:** 4 new modules added ~1,886 lines with only 6.1% patch coverage. The new code is largely untested while the old code coverage stayed stable.
  - **Proposed solution:** Add tests for the new modules. Priority: `core/notify.py` (0%), `services/watcher.py` (0%), `llm/agent_client.py` (24%), `mcp_server.py` (62%).
  - **Uncovered:** `src/symeraseme/core/notify.py` (all lines, in `notify()` and helpers), `src/symeraseme/services/watcher.py` (all lines, in `Watcher` class), `src/symeraseme/llm/agent_client.py:50-236` (`AgentLLMClient` methods)
  - **Effort/Impact:** Medium effort / High impact

- [ ] **[Coverage/WARN] MCP server has 752 uncovered lines**
  - **Status quo:** `src/symeraseme/mcp_server.py` expanded from ~200 to ~1000 lines in #476 (21 MCP tools). Current line coverage 62%, branch coverage 48%.
  - **Likely cause:** New MCP tool handlers added without corresponding tests.
  - **Proposed solution:** Add unit tests for the new MCP tool handlers, focusing on error paths and edge cases.
  - **Uncovered:** `src/symeraseme/mcp_server.py:300-1000` (new tool handlers: `handle_list_requests`, `handle_plan_create`, `handle_plan_execute`, etc.)
  - **Effort/Impact:** Medium effort / Medium impact

- [ ] **[Coverage/WARN] Himalaya v1.2 adapter partially tested**
  - **Status quo:** `src/symeraseme/adapters/email/himalaya.py` has 187 uncovered lines. Line coverage 58%, branch coverage 42%.
  - **Likely cause:** v1.2 compatibility path added in #467 without full test coverage.
  - **Proposed solution:** Add tests for the v1.2 API path (`envelope list/get`, `message send` via stdin).
  - **Uncovered:** `src/symeraseme/adapters/email/himalaya.py:80-218` (v1.2 adapter methods: `_run_himalaya_v1`, `_parse_envelope_v1`)
  - **Effort/Impact:** Low effort / Medium impact

- [ ] **[Coverage/WARN] AgentLLMClient only 24% covered**
  - **Status quo:** `src/symeraseme/llm/agent_client.py` (236 lines) has 24% line coverage, 15% branch coverage.
  - **Likely cause:** New module added in #470 with minimal tests.
  - **Proposed solution:** Add tests for `AgentLLMClient.is_available()`, `classify()`, and subprocess delegation.
  - **Uncovered:** `src/symeraseme/llm/agent_client.py:50-236` (`AgentLLMClient` class methods)
  - **Effort/Impact:** Low effort / Medium impact
